cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(pipeline LANGUAGES C CXX)

# --- 1. C++ Standard ---
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Suppress FLANN/TBB warnings
unset(FLANN_ROOT)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0144 NEW)

# --- CRITICAL: Force CMake to look in /usr/local first ---
# This ensures it finds your custom-built PCL, GTSAM, and TBB
list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "/usr/local")
set(TBB_ROOT "/usr/local")

# --- 2. Dependencies ---
# Use CONFIG mode to force it to read the CMake files generated by your install
find_package(TBB REQUIRED CONFIG)
find_package(GTSAM REQUIRED CONFIG)
find_package(PCL 1.14 REQUIRED COMPONENTS common io filters segmentation kdtree search visualization)
find_package(Eigen3 3.4 REQUIRED) # Explicitly request 3.4
find_package(nlohmann_json REQUIRED)
find_package(OpenMP REQUIRED)
find_package(VTK REQUIRED QUIET)
find_library(CPUID_LIBRARY NAMES cpuid libcpuid)

# --- 3. Include Directories ---
# Add the new extern paths here
set(PIPELINE_INCLUDE_DIRS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/lo_smoother/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/ndt_generic/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/svn_ndt/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/svn_icp/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/robin-map/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../package/lidarcallback/include
    
    ${PCL_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    ${VTK_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    ${EIGEN3_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    ${GTSAM_INCLUDE_DIR}
)

# --- 4. Executable (LIO Pipeline) ---
set(EXE_SOURCES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/lo_pipeline.cpp
)

add_executable(lo_pipeline ${EXE_SOURCES})

# Include dirs
target_include_directories(lo_pipeline PUBLIC ${PIPELINE_INCLUDE_DIRS})

# Link libraries
# Note: TBB::tbb matches the target exported by the new oneTBB config
target_link_libraries(lo_pipeline PUBLIC 
    ${PCL_LIBRARIES}
    gtsam
    gtsam_unstable
    nlohmann_json::nlohmann_json
    TBB::tbb 
    TBB::tbbmalloc 
    OpenMP::OpenMP_CXX 
    ${CPUID_LIBRARY}
)

# --- 5. Optimization Flags ---
# CRITICAL: -march=native ensures ABI compatibility with your custom libraries
if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang")
    target_compile_options(lo_pipeline PRIVATE -O3 -march=native -fopenmp)
endif()

message(STATUS "Build Configured for LIO Pipeline (Header-Only Architecture)")
message(STATUS "  - GTSAM Path: ${GTSAM_DIR}")
message(STATUS "  - PCL Path: ${PCL_DIR}")
message(STATUS "  - TBB Path: ${TBB_DIR}")
